description: Consulting/Professional Services Agreement - engagement terms for advisory, implementation, or managed services

engagement_metadata.description: Core identification details of the consulting engagement and the contracting parties

agreement_title.description: Official title of the consulting or professional services agreement

client_name.description: Full legal name of the client engaging the consultant

consultant_name.description: Full legal name of the consultant or consulting firm

consultant_type.description: Whether the consultant is an individual or a firm

engagement_type.description: Primary nature of the consulting engagement

governing_law.description: Jurisdiction whose laws govern the agreement
extraction_hints: in accordance with the laws of

jurisdiction.description: Courts or venue for dispute resolution

scope_of_services.description: Detailed description of the engagement scope, deliverables, milestones, and boundaries

engagement_description.description: High-level description of the consulting engagement and its objectives

deliverables.description: Specific work products or outputs the consultant must produce

name.description: Name or identifier of the deliverable

description.description: Detailed description of what the deliverable entails

due_date.description: Date by which the deliverable must be completed

acceptance_criteria.description: Criteria the client will use to accept or reject the deliverable

milestones.description: Key project milestones that may trigger payments or phase transitions

name.description: Name or identifier of the milestone

payment_trigger.description: Whether reaching this milestone triggers a payment

out_of_scope_items.description: Items or activities explicitly excluded from the engagement scope

change_request_process.description: Process for requesting changes to the scope of services

assumptions.description: Key assumptions underlying the engagement scope and timeline

dependencies.description: External dependencies required for successful delivery

team_and_resources.description: Personnel assignments, qualifications, and resource allocation for the engagement

key_personnel.description: Named individuals assigned to the engagement with their roles and allocation

name.description: Full name of the key person

role.description: Role or title on the engagement (e.g., Project Lead, Senior Consultant)

allocation_percent.description: Percentage of time allocated to this engagement (0-100)

minimum_qualifications.description: Minimum qualifications or certifications required for engagement personnel

background_checks_required.description: Whether background checks are required for engagement personnel

client_approval_for_substitution.description: Whether client approval is needed before substituting personnel

subcontracting_allowed.description: Whether the consultant may subcontract portions of the work

on_site_requirements.description: Requirements for on-site presence at client facilities

travel_requirements.description: Expected travel obligations for the engagement

fees_and_expenses.description: Compensation structure, billing rates, expense policies, and payment terms

fee_structure.description: Primary fee arrangement for the engagement

hourly_rates.description: Hourly billing rates by role or seniority level

role.description: Role or level (e.g., Partner, Senior Consultant, Analyst)

rate.description: Hourly rate in the applicable currency

daily_rates.description: Daily billing rates by role or seniority level

rate.description: Daily rate in the applicable currency

fixed_fee_amount.description: Total fixed fee amount for the engagement if applicable

retainer_amount.description: Monthly or periodic retainer amount if applicable

retainer_frequency.description: How often the retainer is paid (e.g., monthly, quarterly)

rate_card_reference.description: Reference to an attached rate card exhibit or schedule

rate_escalation.description: Provisions for annual or periodic rate increases

expense_reimbursement.description: Policies for reimbursement of consultant expenses

limits.description: Overall limits or caps on reimbursable expenses

expense_approval_threshold.description: Dollar amount above which individual expenses require prior client approval

invoicing_frequency.description: How often the consultant submits invoices

payment_terms_days.description: Number of days after invoice receipt within which payment is due

late_payment_interest.description: Interest rate or penalty applied to overdue payments

intellectual_property.description: Ownership of work product, pre-existing IP, and licensing provisions

work_product_ownership.description: Who owns the intellectual property created during the engagement
extraction_hints: shall be the sole property of

pre_existing_ip_retained_by_consultant.description: Whether the consultant retains ownership of their pre-existing IP and tools

license_to_pre_existing_ip.description: License granted to the client to use any pre-existing IP incorporated into deliverables

moral_rights_waiver.description: Whether the consultant waives moral rights in the work product

invention_disclosure.description: Requirements for disclosing inventions made during the engagement

open_source_restrictions.description: Restrictions on the use of open source software in deliverables

confidentiality.description: Non-disclosure obligations, confidential information definitions, and survival terms

confidential_info_definition.description: Definition of what constitutes confidential information under the agreement

non_disclosure_obligations.description: Core obligations regarding treatment and protection of confidential information

survival_period_years.description: Number of years confidentiality obligations survive after termination

return_or_destruction_timeline_days.description: Number of days after termination within which confidential information must be returned or destroyed

representations_and_warranties.description: Professional standards, compliance representations, insurance requirements, and contractor status

professional_standard_of_care.description: Standard of care to which the consultant's work will be held

compliance_with_laws.description: Representation that services will comply with applicable laws and regulations

no_conflict_of_interest.description: Representation that the engagement does not create a conflict of interest

insurance_requirements.description: Insurance coverage the consultant must maintain during the engagement

professional_indemnity_amount.description: Required professional indemnity / errors & omissions coverage amount

general_liability_amount.description: Required commercial general liability coverage amount

consultant_status.description: Confirmation that the consultant is an independent contractor, not an employee

independent_contractor_not_employee.description: Whether the agreement explicitly states the consultant is an independent contractor

non_compete_and_solicitation.description: Restrictive covenants including non-solicitation, non-competition, and exclusivity terms

non_solicitation_of_employees.description: Restrictions on soliciting or hiring the other party's employees

exists.description: Whether a non-solicitation of employees clause exists

duration_months.description: Duration of the non-solicitation restriction in months

non_solicitation_of_clients.description: Restrictions on soliciting the other party's clients or customers

exists.description: Whether a non-solicitation of clients clause exists

duration_months.description: Duration of the non-solicitation restriction in months

non_compete.description: Restrictions on the consultant competing with the client

duration_months.description: Duration of the non-compete restriction in months

geographic_scope.description: Geographic area covered by the non-compete restriction

exclusivity_arrangement.description: Whether either party has exclusivity obligations and their scope

termination.description: Termination rights, notice requirements, cure periods, and post-termination obligations

termination_for_convenience_notice_days.description: Number of days' written notice required to terminate the agreement without cause

termination_for_cause_grounds.description: Specific grounds that constitute cause for termination

cure_period_days.description: Number of days the breaching party has to cure a breach after notice

payment_on_termination.description: What the consultant is entitled to be paid upon termination

for_work_completed.description: Whether the consultant is paid for work completed up to the termination date

for_expenses_incurred.description: Whether the consultant is reimbursed for expenses incurred up to termination

wind_down_obligations.description: Obligations of the consultant during the transition or wind-down period

knowledge_transfer_required.description: Whether the consultant must perform knowledge transfer upon termination
